title: [semantic-regression] ECLSBC-1028 SuggestVendorPayments summary
raw_text: ECLSBC-1028 implements a focused update around SuggestVendorPayments in the vendor payment proposal flow. Summary: the development clarifies how SuggestVendorPayments collects candidate invoices, filters blocked vendor ledger entries, and prepares cleaner proposal lines for review. Hungarian summary: Az ECLSBC-1028 fejlesztes osszefoglaloja szerint a SuggestVendorPayments fuggveny a javasolt szallitoi kifizetesek eloallitasat pontositja.

title: [semantic-regression] ECLSBC-899 AN_08MTaxReportTempTable notes
raw_text: ECLSBC-899 documents tax report staging around AN_08MTaxReportTempTable. The implementation uses AN_08MTaxReportTempTable as the temporary table for collecting intermediate tax report rows before final rendering and export.

title: [semantic-regression] ECLSBC-777 posting preview cleanup
raw_text: ECLSBC-777 is an unrelated posting preview cleanup note. It discusses preview page labels, posting warnings, and minor AL readability improvements. It does not describe SuggestVendorPayments or AN_08MTaxReportTempTable.
